titleStmt.title: SII 26.26: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 26. (A.R. No. 26 of 1909.) KUṈṈAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the same pillar in the same place.

This inscription records the gift of lands for food offerings to god Tirumalaiuḍaiya-Tēnāṟṟu-Nāyakar at Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi, one of the villages irrigated by (the river) Tēnāṟu, in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu in Kēraḷasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu by Uyyavandāṉ Gaṇḍan alias Gāṅgēyan alias Tiyāgamīgāman. The lands, stated to be situated at Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi, comprised the other half of the share belonging to the donor. The first half of the share formed the gift to the same deity in No. 25 above, by another donor who was probably the elder brother of the donor of the present record, as can be guessed by the title Adaiḷaiyūr-nāḍāḻvār borne by him, a title which is not borne by the donor of the present record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkarava
ttikaḷ śrīvikramapāṇṭiyadevaṟ
kku yāṇṭu 6Āvatu keraḷaciṅka
vaḷanāṭṭu Ataḷaiyūr nāṭṭu tenā
ṟṟup pokku tirukkuṉṟakkuṭi tiruma
lai Uṭaiya tenāṟṟu nāyakaṟku Uyya
vantāṉ kaṇṭanāna kāṅkeyanāna ti
yāka mīkāmaṉeṉ Innāyanāṟku Amutu
paṭikku tirukkuṉṟakkuṭi vayalil tevatā
nam kaliyāṉantuṭavai rūpāy � kū m kāñ
cirankuṭavai rūpāy 2 1000 �m Ārāmitula
kantuṭavai melatu rūpāy 2 1000m kū kaimā
ntuṭavai rūpāy 2 1000 �m Aṭavi Aracuka
ṟai teṟku rūpāy � m māṟi nāṭṭān tuṭavai
vaṭakku rūpāy 2 1000 [�] Üm cuppiramaṇṇi
ya vayakkal rūpāy 2 1000 �m Ulakan periyā
melatu rūpāy 2 1000m cūṟṟivayakkal
rūpāy 1kāṇi 2 1000 li 6m Allivayakkal rūpāy
ç varai kū ḵ nāṭṭān vayakkal rūpāy �
varai kū ḵ nāṟṟuṭavai taṭi 2 rūpāy
mūn_ṛumā 2 1000 �m kāṭu kāṇicey rūpāy 1kāṇi 2 1000
� kūm kaṇavati tuṭavai rūpāy 2 1000 �
kta Arai m kuḷaṅkovai rūpāy mūn_ṛumā � kū
m kattūri cey rūpāy (1/4)m tiruvārūrva
yakkal rūpāy 1araikkāl (1/4) � m naṅkai
vayakkal rūpāy 1kāni 2 1000 � kū ḵ m tam
moḻi vayakkal rūpāy tma ¿m matacāḷai
vallava rūpāy 4 kū º Āṟukoḷ nik
ki rūpāy 1kāṇi 2 1000 kūm poṉnaṉ vayakka
l rūpāy 1kāṇim maṇiyāttiṟalnallūr va
yalil kucakkuḻi rūpāy 2 1000 �m Āccan
vayakkal rūpāy 1kāṇi �m vallampaṭai
kkāṭeṟu rūpāy 2 1000 pim Āka nilam E
ḻu māvinkiḻ kālil nammuṭaiya pā
ti nila mummāvaraiyin kiḻaraik
kālāluḷḷa Iṟaiyum puḻukupivi
yum An=tarāyamum vevi Ariciyum
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai kuṭi
maikaḷum Ikkoyilil naṭuviṟ teva
ṟku naṭu canti Amutupaṭikku nammu
ṭaiya dharmmadānamāka sandrādityavaṟ
celvatāka nirvārttu Iṟaiyili te
vatāṉamāy Ivvūr puravilum Iṟaṅka
ṭṭu kallilum veṭṭi sandrādityavaṟ ce
lvatāka nirvārttu kuṭutten Uyyava
ntān kaṇṭanāṉa kāṅkeyanāna ti
yāka mikāmanen Innāyanāṟku I
tu panmāheśvararakṣai—
Digital edition of SII 26.26 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
